induction_input: The bill the senator introduced failed.
The cake the chef baked burned.
The dog the owner trained obeyed.
The letter the student wrote vanished.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using center-embedded relative clauses, where a subject noun is modified by a clause ("the [noun] the [noun] [verb]") followed by a single intransitive main verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences using center-embedded relative clauses, where a subject noun is modified by a clause ("the [noun] the [noun] [verb]") followed by a single intransitive main verb.
l2_sentences: The rat the cat chased ran.
The dog the child startled barked.
The deer the wolf stalked fled.
The fish the heron hunted escaped.
The bird the hawk pursued disappeared.
l1_sentences: The bill the senator introduced failed.
The cake the chef baked burned.
The dog the owner trained obeyed.
The letter the student wrote vanished.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
